sections.title: Overview
sections.content: **Microsoft OneNote** connector — `CONNECTOR_TYPE = "onenote"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "oauth2"`. Exposes 17 public async methods. Connects to the Microsoft OneNote (Graph) API to read, search, create, update, and delete notebooks, sections, and pages on behalf of an authenticated Microsoft 365 user.

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
1. Provision credentials in the Microsoft OneNote dashboard.
2. In ACP → Manage Connectors → Microsoft OneNote, fill in the install fields below.
3. Click Install — the connector validates required config keys via `install()`.
4. The gateway calls `health_check()` to confirm credentials are valid.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: Auth type: **oauth2**. Credentials live in `self.config`, read via `self.config.get(...)`. Never hardcoded.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
Install fields (per-tenant):

| Key | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `client_id` | string | yes | Found in Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview |
| `client_secret` | secret | yes | Found in Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets |
| `tenant_id` | string | no | Azure AD tenant. Use 'common' for multi-tenant apps, or a specific tenant GUID/domain for single-tenant apps. |
| `scopes` | string | no | Space-separated list of Microsoft Graph scopes. offline_access is required to receive a refresh token. |
| `auth_url` | string | no | Microsoft identity platform authorization endpoint. |
| `token_url` | string | no | Microsoft identity platform token endpoint. |
| `base_url` | string | no | Base URL for the Microsoft Graph OneNote API. |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | Maximum Graph API requests per minute. Default is 120 (Microsoft's standard quota for OneNote). |

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content:
17 public async methods. See `metadata/connector.json::apis` for full param + return docs.

### `async install()`
Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.
### `async authorize(auth_code, state)`
Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens.
### `async health_check()`
Verifies OneNote API connectivity by listing one notebook.
### `async list_notebooks(top, skip, filter, orderby)`
GET /notebooks — list OneNote notebooks for the signed-in user.
### `async get_notebook(notebook_id)`
GET /notebooks/{id} — fetch a single notebook by ID.
### `async create_notebook(display_name)`
POST /notebooks — create a new notebook.
### `async list_sections(notebook_id, top, skip)`
GET /notebooks/{id}/sections or /sections — list sections, optionally scoped to a notebook.
### `async get_section(section_id)`
GET /sections/{id} — fetch a single section by ID.
### `async create_section(notebook_id, display_name)`
POST /notebooks/{id}/sections — create a section under a notebook.
### `async list_section_groups(notebook_id)`
GET /notebooks/{id}/sectionGroups or /sectionGroups — list section groups.
### `async list_pages(section_id, top, skip, filter, search)`
GET /sections/{id}/pages or /pages — list pages, optionally with filter or search.
### `async get_page(page_id)`
GET /pages/{id} — fetch page metadata.
### `async get_page_content(page_id)`
GET /pages/{id}/content — returns the raw XHTML body of the page.
### `async create_page(section_id, html_body, content_type)`
POST /sections/{id}/pages — create a page from raw XHTML. The Content-Type defaults to application/xhtml+xml.
### `async update_page(page_id, commands)`
PATCH /pages/{id}/content — apply a JSON array of update commands.
### `async delete_page(page_id)`
DELETE /pages/{id} — remove a page.
### `async copy_page_to_section(page_id, target_section_id, group_id)`
POST /pages/{id}/copyToSection — copy a page to another section, optionally specifying a section group.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Common HTTP status mapping (via `_STATUS_MAP` or `_classify_failure`):

| Status | ConnectorHealth | AuthStatus |
|---|---|---|
| 401 | OFFLINE | TOKEN_EXPIRED |
| 403 | UNHEALTHY | INVALID_CREDENTIALS |
| 429 | DEGRADED | CONNECTED (logged) |
| 5xx | UNHEALTHY | FAILED (retried) |

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Fix |
|---|---|
| `MISSING_CREDENTIALS` at install | Verify all required install fields populated |
| `INVALID_CREDENTIALS` at health_check | Confirm API user has required permissions in the Microsoft OneNote dashboard |
| 429 rate limit warnings | The client honours `Retry-After`; reduce request frequency |
